calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: M. Vallejo, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225
Petitioner: Cheng Zhao and Daming Xue, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for /and with/ the Minor: Xiao Yue Xue, were sworn and examined.
Cantonese Interpreter: Xiao Yan Liu

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Kristy Xue.
Decree signed in open court.
